about.title: ABOUT
about.body1: was born at the intersection of rhythm and colour. In the world of Djent, "Offset" means those deliberately displaced polyrhythmic layers — where 7-string low-end riffs interweave with odd time signatures, producing a precise, dizzying chaos.
about.body2: At the same time, "Offset" is a printing term. The band's founder runs a professional print shop. The precision of CMYK four-colour offset printing — registration, colour separation, overprinting — parallels Djent's layered rhythms: each colour plate is like a beat track, simple alone, complex together.

print.title: PRINT
print.body1: The band's founder also runs a professional print shop. The precision of CMYK printing — registration, colour separation, overprinting — mirrors the philosophy of Djent's polyrhythmic layers: each colour plate is a beat track, simple on its own, complex as a whole.
print.body2: We provide professional printing services for bands, independent labels, and music festivals: gig posters, physical album sleeves, screen-printed t-shirts, stickers, and badges.

contact.title: CONTACT
contact.sentSub: We'll get back to you soon.
